TCA-IRR
    Back to Analysis Setup

    Growth Classifier Configuration

    Tune the 6-model DSS classifier, dynamic weights, and tier logic for predicting growth potential.

    DSS Quality Factor Scores
    Adjust the underlying factor scores (0.0-1.0) for each of the 6 models. These scores determine the dynamic ensemble weights.
    Modelw*
    Linear Regression0.1716
    Decision Tree0.1634
    Random Forest0.1671
    XGBoost0.1733
    LSTM0.1647
    Rule-based Heuristic0.1600
    Settings

    Composite score for Tier 1.

    Composite score for Tier 2.

    α=1.0 is pure dynamic, α=0.0 is pure sector prior.

    Growth Tier Definitions
    The final classification assigned by the model.
    TierMeaningInterpretation
    Tier 1High GrowthTop 20-25% of startups; strong, investable signals.
    Tier 2Moderate GrowthMiddle 50-60%; mixed signals, conditional potential.
    Tier 3Low GrowthBottom 20-25%; weak signals, high friction.
    JSON Configuration
    Current classifier configuration for backend use.
